items.title: Study Reveals Gender Pay Gaps Among Freelance Photographers
items.summary: A new global study has revealed gender pay gaps among freelance photographers and videographers working across different creative roles. [Read More]

items.title: Tilta Illusion Magnetic Filters Introduced – Modular Polarization and VND
items.summary: At Cine Gear 2026, Johnnie caught up with Nick from Tilta to look at the company’s new Illusion Magnetic Filters, a modular magnetic system built around polarization and variable ND. Unlike some show…

items.title: Avalanche’s desktop fusion reactor delivers blistering-hot plasma
items.summary: Fusion power startup Avalanche Energy said its reactor prototype heated a plasma to over 10 million degrees C.

items.title: Why two SpaceX alumni are betting on solar and batteries to power the AI craze
items.summary: Ambrosia Energy wants to build power plants in less than 12 months while undercutting natural gas. It hopes to build gigawatts worth by 2030.

items.title: Who Asked for an AI Art Museum?
items.summary: Plus, a child punctures a Magritte in Israel, and Nayland Blake speaks with Hyperallergic about eroticism, play, and the role of the artist.

items.title: Knicks, Tribeca, Pride!
items.summary: We started our series of interviews with queer and trans elders, and the Guggenheim kicks off its World Cup screenings.
